Description.enUS:
Basic worker unit. Can gather resources and warp in Hybrid structures. Can sacrifice itself to become a Spirit.

Can attack ground units.

Tooltip.enUS: Orders selected units to move to the target area or follow the target unit. Moving units will not engage enemies.
Tooltip.ruRU: Orders selected units to move to the target area or follow the target unit. Moving units will not engage enemies.

Tooltip.enUS: Orders selected units to cancel all orders and stop moving.
Tooltip.ruRU: Orders selected units to cancel all orders and stop moving.

Tooltip.enUS: Orders selected units to stay where they are and attack enemies that are within range. Units will neither chase down enemies nor move to engage.
Tooltip.ruRU: Orders selected units to stay where they are and attack enemies that are within range. Units will neither chase down enemies nor move to engage.

Tooltip.enUS: Orders selected units to move to the target point, fighting nearby enemies along the way. Targeting a unit with the Attack command orders that it be attacked until it is destroyed.
Tooltip.ruRU: Orders selected units to move to the target point, fighting nearby enemies along the way. Targeting a unit with the Attack command orders that it be attacked until it is destroyed.

Tooltip.enUS: Orders selected units to patrol between their current position and the target area. Units will attack enemies and move to engage nearby enemies.
Tooltip.ruRU: Orders selected units to patrol between their current position and the target area. Units will attack enemies and move to engage nearby enemies.

Tooltip.enUS: Orders Probe to gather resources from a selected Mineral Field or Vespene Geyser.
Tooltip.ruRU: Orders Probe to gather resources from a selected Mineral Field or Vespene Geyser.

Tooltip.enUS: Returns the carried resources to the nearest drop-off point.
Tooltip.ruRU: Returns the carried resources to the nearest drop-off point.

Tooltip.enUS: A list of basic structures.
A list of advanced structures.
Orders the unit to apply your currently selected spray to the terrain at the target location.
Tooltip.ruRU: Orders the unit to apply your currently selected spray to the terrain at the target location.

Tooltip.enUS: Halts construction of this structure. The partial construction will remain.
Tooltip.ruRU: Приостановить сооружение этого строения. Впоследствии его можно будет продолжить.

Tooltip.enUS: Halts construction of this structure. The partial construction will remain.
Tooltip.ruRU: Приостановить сооружение этого строения. Впоследствии его можно будет продолжить.

Tooltip.enUS: Harvested resource amount of Minion while connected to Network increased by 0.
Minion transforms into a Spirit, a small fast flying scout unit with low health.

Primary structure. Can receive gathered resources.

Enables:
- Minions
Warped in over a Vespene Geyser to allow harvesting of vespene gas.

Provides supply. Supply allows you to warp in more units. Can teleport nearby Hybrid buildings to the target Network location.

Network Power Source.

Moveable structure.

Powerful Anti-Air guardian that test the strength of those who seek the Halls of Revelation. Can be transformed to Anti-Ground construct.

Can attack air units.
Detector
Drops the current order without performing it, and allows you to select a different order.
Tooltip.ruRU: Отменить текущий приказ и отдать следующий.

Tooltip.enUS:
Powerful Anti-Ground guardian that test the strength of those who seek the Halls of Revelation. Can be transformed to Anti-Air construct.

Can attack ground units.
Detector

Warps in Hybrid units.

Enables:
- Warriors
- Flayers

Improve Void Rifts connected to Stasis Cell in Network, containes upgrades for Hybrid units. Each Stasis Cell increases Network amount of its users by 0.

Connected Network Allows:
- Warbringers
- Sentinels
Contains specific upgrades for Hybrids. Build nearby Harvesters to increase their vespene amount.

Improve Void Rifts connected to Stasis Cell in Network. Contains upgrades for Hybrid units.

Connected Network Allows:
- Reavers
- Dominators
Drops the current order without performing it, and allows you to select a different order.
Tooltip.ruRU: Отменить текущий приказ и отдать следующий.

Tooltip.enUS:
Contains weapon and armor upgrades for Hybrid units

Connected Network Allows:
- Horrors

Containes upgrades for Hybrid units.

Enables:
- Silents
- Dreadnoks

Contains upgrades for Hybrid units.

Enables:
- Screamers
- Pollinators
- Navigators

Contains upgrades for Hybrid units.

Enables:
- Upgrade Reaver to Advanced Reaver
- Upgrade Dominator to Advanced Dominator

Contains upgrades for Hybrid units.

Enables:
- Nemesis
